lead_profile_text: STL Switch — fully furnished Nottingham property switching from standard tenancy to short-term letting. Contract terms and performance guarantees were the key objection.
emotional_profile: Risk-averse; concerned about performance guarantees and contractual commitments; fully furnished property reduces setup friction but trust gap was decisive

top_objections.text: Contract terms and performance risk — concerned about guarantees and what happens if performance falls short

top_questions.text: How does STL revenue compare to current long-term tenancy income?
top_questions.answer: Revenue projections presented showing uplift vs LTL

top_questions.text: What are the fees and payout structure?
top_questions.answer: Management fee and monthly payout structure explained

what_moved_them: Fully furnished property reduces setup barrier
Nottingham city centre location well-suited for STL demand
what_fell_flat: Contract terms could not resolve performance concern
Risk profile of STL too high relative to guaranteed tenancy income

conversion_gaps.gap: Contract and performance risk anxiety — no performance evidence or guarantees offered
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Share verified occupancy data from comparable Nottingham properties; consider a short trial period framing
